title: Participle Clauses — Report Writing
description: Master participle clauses for professional report writing: present participle (Analyzing the data, we found...), past participle (Impressed by the results, she...), perfect participle (Having completed the audit, we...), and reduced relative clauses. Write and present comprehensive business reports at C1 level.
descriptionTr: Profesyonel rapor yazimi icin ortac cumleciklerinde ustala: simdiki zaman ortaci (Verileri analiz ederek bulduk...), gecmis zaman ortaci (Sonuclardan etkilenerek...), tamlanmis ortac (Denetimi tamamladiktan sonra...) ve indirgenmiis bagil cumlecikler. C1 seviyede kapsamli is raporlari yaz ve sun.

vocabulary.example: Having completed the quarterly audit, the finance team identified three critical discrepancies.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Ceyreklik denetimi tamamladiktan sonra, finans ekibi uc kritik tutarsizlik belirledi.
vocabulary.extra: Perfect participle — shows one action was finished BEFORE the main action.
vocabulary.extraTr: Tamamlanmis ortac — bir eylemin ana eylemden ONCE bittigini gosterir.

vocabulary.example: Being aware of the budget constraints, the team proposed a cost-effective alternative.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Butce kisitlamalarinin farkinda olarak, ekip maliyet etkin bir alternatif onerdi.
vocabulary.extra: Present participle clause — gives reason or background for the main action.
vocabulary.extraTr: Simdiki zaman ortac cumlecigi — ana eylem icin neden veya arka plan verir.

vocabulary.example: Given that the market conditions have changed, we need to revise our strategy.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Piyasa kosullarinin degistigi goz onune alindiginda, stratejimizirevize etmemiz gerekiyor.
vocabulary.extra: Used to introduce a fact that influences the main statement.
vocabulary.extraTr: Ana ifadeyi etkileyen bir gercegiortaya koymak icin kullanilir.

vocabulary.example: Considering the complexity of the project, the timeline is actually quite reasonable.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Projenin karmasikligi goz onunde bulundurulursa, zaman cizelgesi aslinda oldukca makul.
vocabulary.extra: Often used at the beginning of a sentence to set context for a judgment.
vocabulary.extraTr: Bir yargi icin baglam olusturmak icin genellikle cumlenin basinda kullanilir.

vocabulary.example: Assuming all stakeholders approve the proposal, we can begin implementation in Q3.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Tum paydaslarin teklifi onayladigini varsayarak, 3. ceyrekte uygulamaya baslayabiliriz.
vocabulary.extra: Introduces a condition that is treated as likely true.
vocabulary.extraTr: Muhtemelen dogru kabul edilen bir kosulu ortaya koyar.

vocabulary.example: The expansion will proceed, provided the board approves the additional funding.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Genisleme, yonetim kurulunun ek finansmani onaylamasi kosuluyla devam edecek.
vocabulary.extra: Formal conditional — 'provided that' = 'as long as' / 'on condition that'.
vocabulary.extraTr: Resmi kosul — 'provided that' = 'oldugu surece' / 'kosulunda'.

vocabulary.example: Concerning the logistics division, performance exceeded targets by 12%.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Lojistik bolumuyle ilgili olarak, performans hedefleri %12 asti.
vocabulary.extra: Formal preposition used in reports and official communications.
vocabulary.extraTr: Raporlarda ve resmi iletisimlerde kullanilan resmi edat.

vocabulary.example: Regarding the annual budget, we recommend a 15% increase in R&D allocation.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Yillik butce ile ilgili olarak, Ar-Ge tahsisinde %15 artis oneriyoruz.
vocabulary.extra: Very common in formal emails and reports — 'regarding' = 'about' but more professional.
vocabulary.extraTr: Resmi e-postalarda ve raporlarda cok yaygin — 'regarding' = 'about' ama daha profesyonel.

vocabulary.example: Following the merger, the company restructured its management hierarchy.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Birlesmenin ardindan, sirket yonetim hiyerarsisini yeniden yapilandirdi.
vocabulary.extra: Used as a preposition meaning 'after' in formal writing.
vocabulary.extraTr: Resmi yazida 'sonra' anlaminda edat olarak kullanilir.

vocabulary.example: The new policy reduced waste by 30%, resulting in annual savings of $2.4 million.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Yeni politika atigi %30 azaltti ve yillik 2.4 milyon dolar tasarruf sagladi.
vocabulary.extra: Participle clause showing the consequence or outcome of the main clause.
vocabulary.extraTr: Ana cumlenin sonucunu veya ciktisini gosteren ortac cumlecigi.

vocabulary.example: Supply chain disruptions increased by 40%, leading to significant delivery delays.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Tedarik zinciri aksakliklari %40 artti ve onemli teslimat gecikmelerine yol acti.
vocabulary.extra: Shows cause and effect — the first event causes or leads to the second.
vocabulary.extraTr: Neden-sonuc gosterir — ilk olay ikincisine neden olur veya yol acar.

vocabulary.example: Owing to the global semiconductor shortage, production timelines were extended by three months.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Kuresel yariciiletken kitligi nedeniyle uretim zaman cizelgeleri uc ay uzatildi.
vocabulary.extra: Formal alternative to 'because of' — very common in written reports.
vocabulary.extraTr: 'Because of'un resmi alternatifi — yazili raporlarda cok yaygin.

vocabulary.example: Issues arising from the system migration were resolved within 72 hours.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Sistem gocunden kaynaklanan sorunlar 72 saat icinde cozuldu.
vocabulary.extra: Reduced relative clause — 'issues arising from' = 'issues that arose from'.
vocabulary.extraTr: Indirgenmis bagil cumlecik — 'kaynaklanan sorunlar' = 'dogan sorunlar'.

vocabulary.example: Based on the data collected during Q4, we project a 20% revenue increase for next year.
vocabulary.exampleTr: 4. ceyrekte toplanan verilere dayali olarak, gelecek yil icin %20 gelir artisi ongoruyoruz.
vocabulary.extra: Past participle clause — introduces the foundation or evidence for a conclusion.
vocabulary.extraTr: Gecmis zaman ortac cumlecigi — bir sonuc icin temel veya kaniti ortaya koyar.

vocabulary.example: The steering committee, comprised of senior executives from all divisions, meets quarterly.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Tum bolumlerden ust duzey yoneticilerden olusan yonlendirme komitesi, uc ayda bir toplanir.
vocabulary.extra: Reduced relative clause — 'comprised of' = 'which is comprised of'.
vocabulary.extraTr: Indirgenmis bagil cumlecik — 'olusmus' = 'tarafindan olusan'.

vocabulary.example: The report, consisting of five chapters and an executive summary, was submitted on time.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Bes bolum ve bir yonetici ozetinden olusan rapor zamaninda sunuldu.
vocabulary.extra: Similar to 'comprised of' but slightly less formal.
vocabulary.extraTr: 'Comprised of'a benzer ama biraz daha az resmi.

vocabulary.example: All documents pertaining to the merger must be archived by the legal department.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Birlesmeyle ilgili tum belgeler hukuk departmani tarafindan arsivlenmeli.
vocabulary.extra: Very formal — used in legal, corporate, and government documents.
vocabulary.extraTr: Cok resmi — hukuki, kurumsal ve devlet belgelerinde kullanilir.

vocabulary.example: With respect to market penetration, the Asia-Pacific region showed the highest growth.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Pazar penetrasyonu acisindan, Asya-Pasifik bolgesi en yuksek buyumeyi gosterdi.
vocabulary.extra: Formal prepositional phrase — very common in board reports and presentations.
vocabulary.extraTr: Resmi edat obegidir — yonetim kurulu raporlarinda ve sunumlarda cok yaygin.

vocabulary.example: Notwithstanding the economic downturn, the company maintained profitability throughout the fiscal year.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Ekonomik durgunluga ragmen, sirket mali yil boyunca karliligini korudu.
vocabulary.extra: Very formal — means 'despite' or 'in spite of'. Can come before or after the noun.
vocabulary.extraTr: Cok resmi — 'despite' veya 'in spite of' anlamina gelir. Isimden once veya sonra gelebilir.

vocabulary.example: Quality standards must be maintained irrespective of production volume.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Kalite standartlari uretim hacminden bagimsiz olarak korunmalidir.
vocabulary.extra: Always followed by 'of' — 'irrespective of' = 'regardless of'.
vocabulary.extraTr: Her zaman 'of' ile gelir — 'irrespective of' = 'ne olursa olsun'.

vocabulary.example: We implemented a new system whereby all invoices are automatically verified before payment.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Tum faturalarin odemeden once otomatik olarak dogrulandigi yeni bir sistem uyguladik.
vocabulary.extra: Formal relative pronoun — introduces a method, system, or arrangement.
vocabulary.extraTr: Resmi ilgi zamiri — bir yontem, sistem veya duzenleme tanitir.

vocabulary.example: The annual revenue and the distribution thereof are detailed in Section 4.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Yillik gelir ve bunun dagitimi Bolum 4'te detaylandirilmistir.
vocabulary.extra: Very formal — 'thereof' = 'of that' / 'of it'. Common in legal and financial documents.
vocabulary.extraTr: Cok resmi — 'thereof' = 'onun' / 'bunun'. Hukuki ve mali belgelerde yaygin.

vocabulary.example: Henceforth, all quarterly reports must include a risk assessment section.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Bundan boyle, tum ceyreklik raporlar bir risk degerlendirme bolumu icermelidir.
vocabulary.extra: Formal time expression — 'from this point forward'. Used in policy documents.
vocabulary.extraTr: Resmi zaman ifadesi — 'bu noktadan itibaren'. Politika belgelerinde kullanilir.

vocabulary.example: The aforementioned risks have been addressed in the updated contingency plan.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Yukarida bahsedilen riskler guncellinmis acil durum planinda ele alinmistir.
vocabulary.extra: Refers back to something previously mentioned in the document.
vocabulary.extraTr: Belgede daha once bahsedilen bir seye geri atifta bulunur.

vocabulary.example: The initial report and all subsequent revisions are stored in the central database.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Ilk rapor ve tum sonraki revizyonlar merkezi veritabaninda saklanir.
vocabulary.extra: Formal word for 'later' or 'following' — 'subsequent to' = 'after'.
vocabulary.extraTr: 'Later' veya 'following' icin resmi kelime — 'subsequent to' = 'sonra'.

vocabulary.example: The IT upgrade was concurrent with the office relocation, which complicated both projects.
vocabulary.exampleTr: BT yukseltmesi ofis tasinmasiyla es zamanliydi ve bu her iki projeyi de zorlastirdi.
vocabulary.extra: Formal — 'concurrent with' = 'happening at the same time as'.
vocabulary.extraTr: Resmi — 'concurrent with' = 'ile ayni anda olan'.

vocabulary.example: The preliminary findings suggest a 25% improvement in operational efficiency.
vocabulary.exampleTr: On bulgular operasyonel verimlilikte %25 iyilesme onermektedir.
vocabulary.extra: Comes before the final version — 'preliminary report' = draft or initial findings.
vocabulary.extraTr: Son versiyondan once gelir — 'on rapor' = taslak veya ilk bulgular.

vocabulary.example: An interim report will be issued in June, with the final report due in December.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Haziran'da bir ara donem raporu yayinlanacak, nihai rapor Aralik'ta teslim edilecek.
vocabulary.extra: Describes something temporary that fills the gap until the final version.
vocabulary.extraTr: Nihai versiyona kadar boslugu dolduran gecici bir seyi tanimlar.

vocabulary.example: This comprehensive report covers all aspects of our operations across 12 countries.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Bu kapsamli rapor, 12 ulkedeki operasyonlarimizin tum yonlerini kapsiyor.
vocabulary.extra: A comprehensive report leaves nothing out — it covers everything relevant.
vocabulary.extraTr: Kapsamli bir rapor hicbir seyi disarida birakmaz — ilgili her seyi kapsar.

vocabulary.example: The executive summary provides a high-level overview of the report's key findings and recommendations.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Yonetici ozeti, raporun temel bulgulari ve onerilerinin ust duzey bir genel gorunumunu sunar.
vocabulary.extra: Always appears at the beginning of formal reports — gives busy executives the key points quickly.
vocabulary.extraTr: Her zaman resmi raporlarin basinda yer alir — mesgul yoneticilere temel noktalari hizla verir.

grammar.title: Participle Clauses for Professional Writing
grammar.explanation: Participle clauses allow you to combine two sentences into one, making your writing more concise and sophisticated. They are essential for C1-level report writing, executive summaries, and formal presentations. There are three main types: present participle (-ing), past participle (-ed/irregular), and perfect participle (having + PP). Reduced relative clauses also use participles to shorten complex sentences.
grammar.explanationTr: Ortac cumlecikleri iki cumleyi bir araya getirerek yazinizi daha ozlu ve sofistike hale getirmenizi saglar. C1 seviye rapor yazimi, yonetici ozetleri ve resmi sunumlar icin gereklidir. Uc ana tur vardir: simdiki zaman ortaci (-ing), gecmis zaman ortaci (-ed/duzensiz) ve tamamlanmis ortac (having + PP). Indirgenmis bagil cumlecikler de karmasik cumleleri kisaltmak icin ortaclar kullanir.
table: Present participle (-ing) — simultaneous or causal
Analyzing the Q4 data, the team identified a downward trend in customer retention.
4. ceyrek verilerini analiz ederek, ekip musteri elde tutmada dusus egilimi belirledi.
The -ing clause gives the reason, method, or background for the main action. Both actions happen at roughly the same time or the -ing action is the cause.
Past participle (-ed) — passive meaning
Impressed by the quarterly results, the board approved additional investment.
Ceyreklik sonuclardan etkilenerek, yonetim kurulu ek yatirimi onayladi.
The subject receives the action of the participle. 'Impressed by' = 'because they were impressed by'. Very common in formal reports.
Perfect participle (Having + PP) — completed before main action
Having reviewed all the evidence, we concluded that the system failure was preventable.
Tum kanitlari inceledikten sonra, sistem arizasinin onlenebilir oldugunu sonuclandirdik.
Shows that Action 1 was fully completed BEFORE Action 2 started. Adds formality and precision.
Reduced relative clauses — shortened with participles
The report submitted by the finance team (= which was submitted) contained critical data.
Finans ekibi tarafindan sunulan rapor kritik veriler iceriyordu.
Remove 'who/which/that + be' and keep the participle. Active: 'workers operating the system' = 'who operate'. Passive: 'data collected by' = 'that was collected by'.
Participle clause with 'with' — additional detail
With revenues exceeding expectations, the company announced a special dividend.
Gelirler beklentileri asinca, sirket ozel bir temettü ilan etti.
'With + noun + -ing/-ed' adds extra information or a circumstance to the main clause. Very useful in presentations.
Negative participle — Not having / Not knowing
Not having received confirmation, we postponed the shipment.
Onay almadigimiz icin, sevkiyati erteledik.
Add 'not' before the participle for negation. 'Not having received' = 'Because we hadn't received'.
Formal connectors as participle markers — Given, Considering, Assuming
Given the current economic climate, we recommend a conservative investment approach.
Mevcut ekonomik iklim goz onune alindiginda, muhafazakar bir yatirim yaklasimi oneriyoruz.
These words function as participle-based connectors in formal writing. They introduce conditions, context, or assumptions.

tips.en: The subject of the participle clause MUST be the same as the subject of the main clause. Wrong: 'Walking to the office, the phone rang.' Right: 'Walking to the office, I heard the phone ring.' This is called a 'dangling participle' — avoid it!
tips.tr: Ortac cumleciginin oznesi ana cumlenin ozvesiyle AYNI OLMALIDIR. Yanlis: 'Ofise yururken, telefon caldi.' Dogru: 'Ofise yururken, telefonun caldigini duydum.' Buna 'sarkik ortac' denir — kaçinin!

tips.en: Use 'Having + PP' when the time difference matters: 'Having completed the audit, we submitted the report.' The audit was done FIRST. If you just use -ing, the time relationship is less clear.
tips.tr: 'Having + PP' kullanin zamanlama farki onemli oldugunda: 'Denetimi tamamladiktan sonra, raporu sunduk.' Denetim ONCE yapildi. Sadece -ing kullanirseniz, zaman iliskisi daha az nettir.

tips.en: For formal reports, chain multiple participle clauses: 'Having analyzed the data, reviewed the trends, and consulted with stakeholders, we recommend the following actions.' This sounds very professional.
tips.tr: Resmi raporlar icin birden fazla ortac cumlecigini zincirleyin: 'Verileri analiz edip, egiliemleri inceleyip ve paydaslarla gorusup, asagidaki eylemleri oneriyoruz.' Bu cok profesyonel duyulur.

tips.en: Reduced relative clauses save space in reports: Instead of 'The issues that were identified during the audit,' write 'The issues identified during the audit.' Shorter, cleaner, more C1.
tips.tr: Indirgenmis bagil cumlecikler raporlarda yer tasarrufu saglar: 'Denetim sirasinda belirlenen sorunlar' yerine 'Denetimde belirlenen sorunlar' yazin. Daha kisa, daha temiz, daha C1.

tips.en: Master these formal connectors for reports: 'Given that' (fact-based), 'Considering' (judgment), 'Assuming' (hypothesis), 'Provided that' (condition), 'Notwithstanding' (despite). They elevate your writing instantly.
tips.tr: Raporlar icin bu resmi baglacları ustala: 'Given that' (gercek temelli), 'Considering' (yargi), 'Assuming' (hipotez), 'Provided that' (kosul), 'Notwithstanding' (ragmen). Yazinizi aninda yukseltirler.

tips.en: In executive summaries, start with participle clauses for impact: 'Having achieved record growth in Q3, the company is well-positioned for expansion.' It front-loads the achievement before the recommendation.
tips.tr: Yonetici ozetlerinde etki icin ortac cumlecikleriyle baslayın: 'Q3'te rekor buyume elde ettikten sonra, sirket genisleme icin iyi konumlandı.' Basariyi oneriden once one cikarir.

reading.text:
EXECUTIVE SUMMARY — Annual Logistics Performance Report 2024

Prepared by: NovaTech Solutions — Supply Chain & Logistics Division

Having completed a comprehensive review of all logistics operations across 14 countries, we are pleased to present the key findings and strategic recommendations for 2025. This report, consisting of eight chapters and supporting appendices, covers operational performance, financial metrics, risk assessment, and forward-looking projections.

Concerning overall performance, the logistics division achieved a 94.2% on-time delivery rate, representing a 3.7% improvement over the previous year. Owing to the implementation of AI-powered route optimization, fuel costs decreased by 18%, resulting in annual savings of $4.8 million. The warehouse automation program, launched in Q2, reduced processing times by 35%, with concurrent improvements in accuracy rates from 97.1% to 99.4%.

With respect to financial performance, total revenue reached $287 million, exceeding the projected target by 11%. Operating margins improved from 16.8% to 21.3%, driven primarily by technology investments and workforce optimization. Notwithstanding the global supply chain disruptions experienced in Q1 and Q2, the division maintained profitability throughout all four quarters.

Regarding risk management, the aforementioned supply chain disruptions were effectively mitigated through supplier diversification and strategic inventory positioning. Issues arising from the Q1 semiconductor shortage were resolved within 45 days. A preliminary assessment of emerging risks — including geopolitical instability and regulatory changes — has been incorporated into the 2025 contingency framework.

Based on the data presented in this report and assuming current market conditions remain stable, we project a 15-20% revenue growth for 2025. Provided the board approves the proposed $12 million technology investment, the division expects to achieve a 97% on-time delivery rate by Q4 2025. Given that our competitors are investing heavily in last-mile delivery technology, we recommend accelerating our own capabilities in this area. Henceforth, all quarterly reports will include a dedicated technology roadmap section to track progress against these strategic objectives.
reading.textTr:
YONETICI OZETI — 2024 Yillik Lojistik Performans Raporu

Hazirlayan: NovaTech Solutions — Tedarik Zinciri ve Lojistik Bölümü

14 ulkedeki tum lojistik operasyonlarin kapsamli bir incelemesini tamamladiktan sonra, 2025 icin temel bulgulari ve stratejik onerileri sunmaktan memnuniyet duyariz. Sekiz bolum ve destekleyici eklerden olusan bu rapor, operasyonel performans, finansal metrikler, risk degerlendirmesi ve ileriye donuk projeksiyonlari kapsar.

Genel performansla ilgili olarak, lojistik bolumu %94.2 zamaninda teslimat orani elde etti ve bu, onceki yila gore %3.7 iyilesmeyi temsil ediyor. Yapay zeka destekli rota optimizasyonunun uygulanmasi nedeniyle, yakit maliyetleri %18 azaldi ve yillik 4.8 milyon dolar tasarruf saglandi. 2. ceyrekte baslayan depo otomasyon programi, isleme surelerini %35 azaltti ve es zamanli olarak dogruluk oranlarini %97.1'den %99.4'e yükseltti.

Finansal performans acisindan, toplam gelir 287 milyon dolara ulasti ve ongorülen hedefi %11 asti. Faaliyet marjlari, esas olarak teknoloji yatirimlari ve is gucü optimizasyonu tarafindan yonlendirilerek %16.8'den %21.3'e yükeldi. 1. ve 2. ceyreklerde yasanan kuresel tedarik zinciri aksakliklarina ragmen, bolum dort ceyregin tamaminda karliligini korudu.

Risk yonetimiyle ilgili olarak, yukarda bahsedilen tedarik zinciri aksakliklari, tedarikci cesitlendirmesi ve stratejik envanter konumlandirmasi yoluyla etkili bir sekilde hafifletildi. 1. ceyrekteki yariciiletken kitligindan kaynaklanan sorunlar 45 gun icinde cozuldu. Jeopolitik istikrarsizlik ve duzenleyici degisiklikler dahil olmak uzere ortaya cikan risklerin on degerlendirmesi, 2025 acil durum cercevesine dahil edilmistir.

Bu raporda sunulan verilere dayali olarak ve mevcut piyasa kosullarinin istikrarli kaldigini varsayarak, 2025 icin %15-20 gelir artisi ongoruyoruz. Yonetim kurulunun onerilen 12 milyon dolarlik teknoloji yatirimini onaylamasi kosulyla, bolum 2025 4. ceyregine kadar %97 zamaninda teslimat oranina ulasmayi bekliyor. Rakiplerimizin son mil teslimat teknolojisine yogun yatirim yaptigi goz onune alindiginda, bu alandaki kendi yeteneklerimizi hizlandirmayi oneriyoruz. Bundan boyle, tum ceyreklik raporlar bu stratejik hedeflere karsi ilerlemeyi izlemek icin ozel bir teknoloji yol haritasi bolumu icerecektir.

questions.question: What was the on-time delivery rate achieved by the logistics division?
questions.questionTr: Lojistik bolumunun elde ettigi zamaninda teslimat orani neydi?

questions.question: How much did fuel costs decrease owing to AI-powered route optimization?
questions.questionTr: Yapay zeka destekli rota optimizasyonu sayesinde yakit maliyetleri ne kadar azaldi?

questions.question: What formal connector is used to mean 'despite' in the financial performance paragraph?
questions.questionTr: Finansal performans paragrafinda 'ragmen' anlaminda hangi resmi baglac kullanilmistir?

questions.question: What condition must be met for the division to achieve a 97% on-time delivery rate?
questions.questionTr: Bolumun %97 zamaninda teslimat oranina ulasmasi icin hangi kosul karsilanmali?
options: The board approving a $12 million technology investment

questions.question: What new section will all quarterly reports include henceforth?
questions.questionTr: Bundan boyle tum ceyreklik raporlar hangi yeni bolumu icerecek?

dialog.title: Presenting the Annual Report to the Board of Directors
dialog.context: Eyup, NovaTech Solutions'in yillik lojistik performans raporunu yonetim kuruluna sunuyor. Katilimcilar: Ms. Richardson (Yonetim Kurulu Baskani), Mr. Hoffmann (CFO), Ms. Park (Strateji Direktoru), Mr. Al-Rashid (Operasyon Direktoru).

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Good morning, everyone. We're here to review the 2024 Annual Logistics Performance Report. Eyüp, having led the logistics division through a transformative year, I believe you're the best person to walk us through the findings. The floor is yours.
lines.textTr: Gunaydin, millet. 2024 Yillik Lojistik Performans Raporunu incelemek icin buradayiz. Eyup, lojistik bolumunu donusturucu bir yil boyunca yonettikten sonra, bulgulari bize aktarmak icin en uygun kisi oldugunuza inaniyorum. Soz sizin.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Thank you, Ms. Richardson. Good morning, everyone. I'm pleased to present the annual report, consisting of eight chapters covering operational performance, financial metrics, risk assessment, and forward-looking projections. Having analyzed data from all 14 countries where we operate, I can confirm this has been our strongest year to date.
lines.textTr: Tesekkurler, Bayan Richardson. Gunaydin millet. Operasyonel performans, finansal metrikler, risk degerlendirmesi ve ileriye donuk projeksiyonlari kapsayan sekiz bolumden olusan yillik raporu sunmaktan memnuniyet duyarim. Faaliyet gosterdigimiz 14 ulkenin verilerini analiz ettikten sonra, bunun bugunekadarki en guclu yilimiz oldugunu teyit edebilirim.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Concerning overall performance, we achieved a 94.2% on-time delivery rate — a 3.7% improvement over last year. The warehouse automation program, launched in Q2, reduced processing times by 35%. With accuracy rates improving from 97.1% to 99.4%, we're now operating at near-perfect precision.
lines.textTr: Genel performansla ilgili olarak, %94.2 zamaninda teslimat orani elde ettik — gecen yila gore %3.7 iyilesme. 2. ceyrekte baslayan depo otomasyon programi, isleme surelerini %35 azaltti. Dogruluk oranlari %97.1'den %99.4'e yukselerek, artik neredeyse kusursuz hassasiyetle calisiyoruz.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Impressive numbers, Eyüp. With respect to the financial side, I noticed operating margins improved significantly. Could you elaborate on the key drivers?
lines.textTr: Etkileyici rakamlar, Eyup. Finansal tarafla ilgili olarak, faaliyet marjlarinin onemli olcude iyilestigini fark ettim. Temel etkenler hakkinda ayrintili bilgi verebilir misiniz?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Certainly, Mr. Hoffmann. Total revenue reached $287 million, exceeding our target by 11%. Operating margins improved from 16.8% to 21.3%. This was driven primarily by two factors. First, owing to the implementation of AI-powered route optimization, fuel costs decreased by 18%, resulting in annual savings of $4.8 million. Second, the workforce optimization initiative, completed in Q3, reduced overhead by 12% without any layoffs — achieved entirely through retraining and redeployment.
lines.textTr: Elbette, Bay Hoffmann. Toplam gelir 287 milyon dolara ulasti ve hedefimizi %11 asti. Faaliyet marjlari %16.8'den %21.3'e yükseldi. Bu esas olarak iki faktor tarafindan yonlendirildi. Birincisi, yapay zeka destekli rota optimizasyonunun uygulanmasi nedeniyle, yakit maliyetleri %18 azaldi ve yillik 4.8 milyon dolar tasarruf sagladi. Ikincisi, 3. ceyrekte tamamlanan is gucu optimizasyonu girisimi, herhangi bir isten cikarma olmadan genel giderleri %12 azaltti — tamamen yeniden egitim ve yeniden konuslandirma yoluyla gerceklestirildi.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Eyüp, regarding risk management — we experienced significant supply chain disruptions in the first half. How were those handled?
lines.textTr: Eyup, risk yonetimiyle ilgili olarak — ilk yarida onemli tedarik zinciri aksakliklari yasadik. Bunlar nasil ele alindi?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Great question, Ms. Park. Notwithstanding the global supply chain disruptions experienced in Q1 and Q2, the division maintained profitability throughout all four quarters. Issues arising from the semiconductor shortage were resolved within 45 days. Having anticipated potential disruptions during our Q4 2023 planning cycle, we had already diversified our supplier base — which proved to be the right decision.
lines.textTr: Harika soru, Bayan Park. 1. ve 2. ceyreklerde yasanan kuresel tedarik zinciri aksakliklarina ragmen, bolum dort ceyregin tamaminda karliligini korudu. Yariciiletken kitligindan kaynaklanan sorunlar 45 gun icinde cozuldu. 2023 4. ceyrek planlama donemimizde potansiyel aksakliklari onceden ongorduguumuz icin, tedarikci tabanimimizi zaten cesitlendirmistik — bu dogru karar oldugu ortaya cikti.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: I want to highlight something here. Based on the data Eyüp's team collected, the supplier diversification strategy reduced our dependency on single-source suppliers from 40% to 15%. That's a remarkable achievement, considering the complexity of our supply chain.
lines.textTr: Burada bir seyi vurgulamak istiyorum. Eyup'un ekibinin topladigi verilere dayali olarak, tedarikci cesitlendirme stratejisi tek kaynakli tedarikcilere bagimliligimizi %40'tan %15'e dusurdu. Tedarik zincirimizin karmasikligi goz onunde bulundurulursa, bu dikkat cekici bir basari.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Thank you, Mr. Al-Rashid. Now, moving to the forward-looking section. Assuming current market conditions remain stable, we project a 15-20% revenue growth for 2025. However, I want to be transparent about the assumptions underlying these projections.
lines.textTr: Tesekkurler, Bay Al-Rashid. Simdi, ileriye donuk bolume gecelim. Mevcut piyasa kosullarinin istikrarli kaldigini varsayarak, 2025 icin %15-20 gelir artisi ongoruyoruz. Ancak, bu projeksiyonlarin altinda yatan varsayimlar konusunda seffaf olmak istiyorum.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Given that our competitors are investing heavily in last-mile delivery technology, we risk falling behind if we don't accelerate our own capabilities. The report includes a detailed technology investment proposal — $12 million over 18 months — focused on three areas: autonomous sorting systems, predictive analytics for demand forecasting, and electric vehicle fleet expansion.
lines.textTr: Rakiplerimizin son mil teslimat teknolojisine yogun yatirim yaptigi goz onune alindiginda, kendi yeteneklerimizi hizlandirmazsak geride kalma riskiyle karsi karsiyayiz. Rapor, uc alana odaklanan 18 ay boyunca 12 milyon dolarlik detayli bir teknoloji yatirim teklifi iceriyor: otonom ayirma sistemleri, talep tahmini icin ongorusel analitik ve elektrikli arac filosu genislemesi.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Twelve million is substantial. What's the projected ROI, provided the investment is approved?
lines.textTr: On iki milyon buyuk bir miktar. Yatirim onaylanmasi kosulunda, ongorulen yatirim getirisi nedir?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Provided the board approves the full investment, we project a break-even point at 14 months and a 340% ROI over three years. The autonomous sorting systems alone, having been piloted in our Amsterdam facility, demonstrated a 45% reduction in labor costs. Scaled across all hubs, that translates to approximately $8 million in annual savings.
lines.textTr: Yonetim kurulunun tam yatirimi onaylamasi kosuluyla, 14 ayda basabasnoktasi ve uc yil boyunca %340 yatirim getirisi ongoruyoruz. Amsterdam tesisimizde pilot uygulamasi yapilan yalnizca otonom ayirma sistemleri, iscilik maliyetlerinde %45 azalma gosterdi. Tum merkezlere olceklendirildiginde, bu yaklasik yillik 8 milyon dolar tasarrufa donusuyor.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: That's compelling. Concerning the electric vehicle fleet expansion — is that driven by regulatory requirements or strategic positioning?
lines.textTr: Bu ikna edici. Elektrikli arac filosu genislemesiyle ilgili olarak — bu duzenleyici gereksinimlerle mi yoksa stratejik konumlandirmayla mi yonlendiriliyor?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Both, actually. The EU Green Deal regulations, taking effect in 2026, will require 40% of commercial fleets to be electric. Not having started the transition now would put us at a significant disadvantage. Additionally, our preliminary analysis shows that electric vehicles reduce per-kilometer operating costs by 32%, irrespective of regulatory requirements.
lines.textTr: Aslinda her ikisi de. 2026'da yururluge girecek AB Yesil Mutabakat duzenlemeleri, ticari filolarin %40'inin elektrikli olmasini gerektirecek. Gecisi simdi baslatmamis olmak bizi onemli bir dezavantaja sokacakti. Ek olarak, on analizimiz elektrikli araclarin kilometre basina isletme maliyetlerini duzenleyici gereksinimlerden bagimsiz olarak %32 azalttigini gosteriyor.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Eyüp, one final question. The report mentions 'henceforth, all quarterly reports will include a technology roadmap section.' Can you explain the rationale?
lines.textTr: Eyup, son bir soru. Rapor 'bundan boyle, tum ceyreklik raporlar bir teknoloji yol haritasi bolumu icerecektir' diye bahsediyor. Gerekceyi aciklayabilir misiniz?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Absolutely. Having observed that technology investments were not systematically tracked in previous reports, we identified a gap in our governance framework. The technology roadmap section, consisting of milestone tracking, budget utilization, and impact metrics, will ensure full transparency and accountability. This way, the board can monitor progress against strategic objectives on a quarterly basis.
lines.textTr: Kesinlikle. Onceki raporlarda teknoloji yatirimlarinin sistematik olarak izlenmedigini gozlemledikten sonra, yonetisim cercevemizde bir bosluk belirledik. Kilometre tasi takibi, butce kullanimi ve etki metriklerinden olusan teknoloji yol haritasi bolumu, tam seffaflik ve hesap verebilirlik saglayacaktir. Bu sayede, yonetim kurulu stratejik hedeflere karsi ilerlemeyi ceyreklik bazda izleyebilir.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: I'd like to add that the operational team fully supports this initiative. With real-time visibility into technology investments, we can make faster, more informed decisions. The subsequent quarterly reports will be much more actionable as a result.
lines.textTr: Operasyon ekibinin bu girisimi tamamen destekledigini eklemek istiyorum. Teknoloji yatirimlarini gercek zamanli gorunurlukle, daha hizli ve daha bilgili kararlar alabiliriz. Sonuc olarak, sonraki ceyreklik raporlar cok daha eyleme donusturulebilir olacak.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Thank you, Mr. Al-Rashid. To summarize: having achieved record performance across all key metrics in 2024, the logistics division is well-positioned for continued growth. The technology investment proposal, detailed in Chapter 7, represents a strategic imperative rather than an optional expense. Provided we act decisively now, we'll maintain our competitive advantage and meet the evolving regulatory landscape.
lines.textTr: Tesekkurler, Bay Al-Rashid. Ozetlemek gerekirse: 2024'te tum temel metriklerde rekor performans elde ettikten sonra, lojistik bolumu surdurulebilir buyume icin iyi konumlanmistir. Bolum 7'de detaylanan teknoloji yatirimi teklifi, opsiyonel bir gider degil stratejik bir zorunlulugu temsil ediyor. Simdi kararli davranmamiz kosuluyla, rekabet avantajimizi koruyacak ve gelisen duzenleyici ortami karsilayacagiz.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Excellent presentation, Eyüp. The data is comprehensive, the analysis is rigorous, and the recommendations are well-founded. I propose we vote on the technology investment at our next board meeting. Any objections?
lines.textTr: Mukemmel sunum, Eyup. Veriler kapsamli, analiz titiz ve oneriler saglam temellere dayaniyor. Teknoloji yatirim icin bir sonraki yonetim kurulu toplantimizda oy vermeyi oneriyorum. Herhangi bir itiraz var mi?

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: No objections from my side. Based on the numbers presented, the investment case is solid. Having reviewed the financial projections in detail before this meeting, I'm satisfied with the methodology and the assumptions.
lines.textTr: Benim tarafimdan itiraz yok. Sunulan rakamlara dayali olarak, yatirim gerekçesi saglam. Bu toplantidan once finansal projeksiyonlari detayli olarak inceledikten sonra, metodoloji ve varsayimlardan memnunum.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Thank you, everyone. I'm grateful for your confidence and support. The full report, including all appendices and the executive summary pertaining to each chapter, has been distributed digitally. Henceforth, I'll provide monthly progress updates on the strategic initiatives outlined today. If there are no further questions, I'll conclude by saying: 2024 was exceptional, but 2025 will be even better.
lines.textTr: Tesekkurler, millet. Guveniniz ve destekleriniz icin minnettarim. Her bolume ait tum ekler ve yonetici ozetleri dahil olmak uzere tam rapor dijital olarak dagitilmistir. Bundan boyle, bugun belirtilen stratejik girisimlerde aylik ilerleme guncellemeleri saglayacagim. Baska soru yoksa, sunu soyleyerek bitireyim: 2024 olaganustu oldun, ama 2025 daha da iyi olacak.

questions.question: How many chapters does the annual report consist of?
What was the total revenue achieved in 2024?
questions.questionTr: 2024'te elde edilen toplam gelir ne kadardi?

questions.question: What participle clause type is used in 'Having analyzed data from all 14 countries, I can confirm...'?
questions.questionTr: '14 ulkenin verilerini analiz ettikten sonra, teyit edebilirim...' cumlesinde hangi ortac cumlecigi turu kullanilmistir?

questions.question: What is the projected ROI of the $12 million technology investment over three years?
questions.questionTr: 12 milyon dolarlik teknoloji yatiriminin uc yil boyunca ongorulen yatirim getirisi nedir?

questions.question: What new element will quarterly reports include from now on?
questions.questionTr: Ceyreklik raporlar bundan sonra hangi yeni unsuru icerecek?

fillBlanks.sentence: ___ completed the quarterly audit, the team submitted the final report.
fillBlanks.hint: Perfect participle — completed before the main action

fillBlanks.sentence: ___ aware of the budget constraints, we proposed a cost-effective solution.
fillBlanks.hint: Present participle — gives reason for the main action

fillBlanks.sentence: ___ that the market conditions have changed, we need to revise our strategy.
fillBlanks.hint: Formal connector — introduces a fact that influences the main statement

fillBlanks.sentence: ___ the complexity of the project, the timeline is quite reasonable.
fillBlanks.hint: Participle-based connector — sets context for a judgment

fillBlanks.sentence: The expansion will proceed, ___ the board approves the funding.
fillBlanks.hint: Formal conditional — 'as long as' / 'on condition that'

fillBlanks.sentence: ___ to the implementation of AI, fuel costs decreased by 18%.
Issues ___ from the system migration were resolved quickly.
The report, ___ of five chapters, was submitted on time.
___ the economic downturn, the company maintained profitability.
Quality must be maintained ___ of production volume.
The ___ findings suggest a 25% improvement in efficiency.
An ___ report will be issued before the final version.
All documents ___ to the merger must be archived.
___, all quarterly reports will include a risk section.
The ___ risks have been addressed in the updated plan.

multipleChoice.question: "___ analyzed the data, the team identified three critical issues." Dogru secim?
"___ by the quarterly results, the board approved additional investment." Dogru secim?
"The report, ___ by the finance team, contained critical data." Dogru secim?
Hangi cumle 'reduced relative clause' icerir?
options: The report which was submitted yesterday...
The report that someone submitted yesterday...

multipleChoice.question: "___ all stakeholders approve, we can begin." Dogru baglac?
"Revenue grew by 20%, ___ in annual savings of $3 million." Dogru secim?
"Issues ___ from the shortage were resolved." Dogru secim?
What is an 'executive summary'?
options: A high-level overview of key findings

multipleChoice.question: "___ the current climate, we recommend caution." Dogru baglac?
"A system ___ invoices are verified automatically." Dogru secim?
"Not ___ received confirmation, we postponed the shipment." Dogru secim?

sentenceOrder.correct: Having completed the audit we submitted the report
Impressed by the results the board approved the investment
Owing to the shortage production was delayed
Revenue grew by 20% resulting in significant savings
Given the current conditions we recommend caution
Notwithstanding the disruptions the company maintained profitability
Issues arising from the migration were resolved quickly
The report consisting of eight chapters was distributed
Not having received confirmation we postponed the shipment
Henceforth all reports will include a technology section

translation.turkish: Verileri analiz ettikten sonra, ekip uc kritik sorun belirledi.
translation.english: Having analyzed the data, the team identified three critical issues.
acceptAlso: After analyzing the data, the team identified three critical issues

translation.turkish: Ceyreklik sonuclardan etkilenerek, yonetim kurulu ek yatirimi onayladi.
translation.english: Impressed by the quarterly results, the board approved additional investment.
acceptAlso: Being impressed by the quarterly results, the board approved additional investment

translation.turkish: Kuresel aksakliklara ragmen, sirket karliligini korudu.
translation.english: Notwithstanding the global disruptions, the company maintained profitability.
acceptAlso: Despite the global disruptions, the company maintained profitability

translation.turkish: Yariciiletken kitligi nedeniyle uretim sureler uzatildi.
translation.english: Owing to the semiconductor shortage, production timelines were extended.
acceptAlso: Due to the semiconductor shortage, production timelines were extended

translation.turkish: Sistem gocunden kaynaklanan sorunlar 45 gun icinde cozuldu.
translation.english: Issues arising from the system migration were resolved within 45 days.
acceptAlso: Issues that arose from the system migration were resolved within 45 days

translation.turkish: Yonetim kurulunun yatirimi onaylamasi kosuluyla, genislemeye devam edecegiz.
translation.english: Provided the board approves the investment, we will proceed with the expansion.
acceptAlso: As long as the board approves the investment, we will proceed with the expansion

translation.turkish: Mevcut piyasa kosullari goz onune alindiginda, stratejimizirevize etmeliyiz.
translation.english: Given the current market conditions, we need to revise our strategy.
acceptAlso: Considering the current market conditions, we need to revise our strategy

translation.turkish: Bundan boyle, tum raporlar bir teknoloji bolumu icerecektir.
translation.english: Henceforth, all reports will include a technology section.
acceptAlso: From now on, all reports will include a technology section

translation.turkish: Sekiz bolumden olusan rapor zamaninda sunuldu.
translation.english: The report, consisting of eight chapters, was submitted on time.
acceptAlso: The report consisting of eight chapters was submitted on time

translation.english: Not having received confirmation, we postponed the shipment.
acceptAlso: Because we hadn't received confirmation, we postponed the shipment
